chunks.text: Today 's dinner was as cheerful as a special day.
Since the breakfast hours, my mother was busy in the kitchen.
The scent of many dishes filled the house.
On the table, there was a big bowl of shining rice.
Next to it, there was a dish of beef cooked in a sweet sauce
On another plate, there was freshly cooked chicken.
It was lightly sprinkled with salt, and the smell was so good.
“ I picked these from the garden this morning,” my mother said with a smile.
Beside the plates, there was a dish of colorful vegetables.
Both the meat and the vegetables were fresh today — a special feast.
For dessert, there were sweet red grapes and apples cut into small pieces.
We enjoyed them slowly with cold tea.
Sitting around the dinner table — perhaps this is the happiest moment in every day.
My mother 's special soup with egg was also delicious tonight.
